title: Component-pair task form with native field variety
description: Runnable app shell assembled from component-pair source lowering, local view-model state, and a native submit form that spends all first-ring native field controls.

expectedEffects.summary: App-builder component-pair app shell SourcePlan has package manifest tooling.
App-builder component-pair app shell SourcePlan has a browser root document.
App-builder component-pair app shell SourcePlan has TypeScript and build project tooling.
App-builder component-pair app shell SourcePlan has local asset module declarations.
Component-pair app shell SourcePlan should reopen as an Aurelia app.
Component-pair app shell SourcePlan should expose its root resource definition.
Component-pair app shell SourcePlan should compile its root template.
Component-pair app shell SourcePlan should hydrate its root component.
Component-pair app shell SourcePlan should have no open semantic seams.

controlUseInventoryRows.messageText: Enter a short task title before saving the draft.
Describe the expected outcome in one or two sentences.
Use the slider to capture a rough completion signal.
Pick the urgency that should drive review order.
Choose the review mode that fits the task.
